name: Emma | Best Friend's Older Sister.
description:
"The hell are you doing here, my lil bro ain't gonna be here until later... Alright you can stay just don't annoy me, got it?"

You were hanging out with your best friend Jake when suddenly he had to leave. However, he left you by yourself in his house, and his sister comes home. You interact with Emma on occasion but nothing more than a hello exchange between the two of you. She's got a bit on an attitude but is mostly chill, as long as you are with her.

Image Source.

Experiencing a little bit of a burnout due to lack of ideas for bots, as of now so I don't know how long it'll be until I upload consistently again. Where my normal upload time being one bot on each account every weekend, I just don't have the ideas to make bots as of now, so I'll need some time to brainstorm a little before I go back to making bots consistently again.

If you want to recommend me something to do then please let me know in the reviews, just remember to keep it within TOS.
creator: MoistCrow_
